work_unit: H-004 fact_checker empty-search auto-FALSIFIED → UNVERIFIABLE (search-poisoning DoS mitigation)
situation: audit-2026-07-06-022 H-004 finding: script-verifier/fact_checker.py:330-334 returned verdict=FALSIFIED when search_result empty AND claim.risk=='high'. Attack surface: adversary crafts high-risk claims whose keywords guarantee empty search results → all auto-labeled FALSIFIED → report credibility artificially tanked. Equivalent to search-poisoning DoS against the QA verifier pipeline.
action: Changed high-risk empty-search branch from FALSIFIED to UNVERIFIABLE + confidence=0.0 + needs_claude_review=True, aligning with the existing ERROR: branch at line 313-319. Added explanatory comment referencing H-004 + audit id. Committed directly in diverged worktree opt-wechat-main-1783130541 via case-104 escape hatch (cp-guard skipped due to prior WM-FC-01/02/03 fact_checker fixes already stacked in that WT). Pushed to origin.
outcome_evidence: git commit e70c5cd on auto/opt-wechat-main-1783130541; pushed cb4ca49..e70c5cd to origin/qunbu/wechat; diff: 1 file changed, 8 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-) at line 329-340 replacing FALSIFIED return with UNVERIFIABLE+needs_claude_review

audit_findings.finding: Empty search result + risk=high auto-returns FALSIFIED without human review, enabling search-poisoning DoS against QA verifier
audit_findings.remediation: Return UNVERIFIABLE + needs_claude_review=True instead, consistent with ERROR: branch semantics
